name: Dark Ascension

draft.notes: Only 9 commons; pack also includes 1 double-faced card and either a basic land (1/4) or a checklist (3/4). Foil is the last card and displaces a common (unlike Innistrad, foil DFCs also displace commons). Innistrad basic lands appear in packs. [Refined: added dedicated DFC slot (filter: double_faced) so the pack totals 15.]

statedRates: basic land appears in 1/4 of packs, checklist in 3/4
sourceNotes: Small set with 13 double-faced cards; 9 commons per pack to make room for the DFC slot. Uses Innistrad basic lands (not part of the set). Marketing/ad cards bear tokens/emblems on the front but counted as ad card. Foil 1:67. 36 packs per box.
